seoTitle: Thinoomba vs Thompson Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Thinoomba and Thompson Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Thinoomba vs Thompson Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thinoomba and Thompson Point.
heading: Thinoomba vs Thompson Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thinoomba, Queensland and Thompson Point, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thinoomba has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Thompson Point (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thinoomba or Thompson Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thinoomba has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Thompson Point scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thinoomba scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Thompson Point scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thinoomba or Thompson Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thinoomba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
